reasoning: The document shows high fidelity scores (0.91) and a perfect word count ratio, but exhibits several minor OCR omissions in a formal government resolution, including missing verbs and titles. Additionally, the content duplication via redundant image segments at the end of the document poses a minor accessibility concern that should be cleaned up for professional publication.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis:
There are three minor textual discrepancies where words or suffixes were omitted during the conversion/OCR process: 
1. In the first WHEREAS clause (reading_order 4), the title 'Rep' is missing from 'US Rep Norma T. Torres'.
2. In the fourth WHEREAS clause (reading_order 7), the verb 'are' is missing from the phrase '911 dispatchers are working'.
3. In the final resolving paragraph (reading_order 10), 'Protective Services Occupations' is incorrectly rendered as 'Protective Service Occupations',
concerns.source_pdf_quote: WHEREAS, in September of 2021, US Rep Norma T. Torres... WHEREAS, 911 dispatchers are working with... to “Protective Services Occupations”
concerns.output_quote: WHEREAS, in September of 2021, US Norma T. Torres... WHEREAS, 911 dispatchers working with... to “Protective Service Occupations”

concerns.analysis: The HTML output contains significant visual duplication of the body content. Following the accessible HTML text and the individual signature images, the document renders several large images that are high-contrast/thresholded segments of the original page. These images repeat the title, all 'WHEREAS' clauses, the 'NOW THEREFORE' clause, and the signatures that were already presented in the main HTML body.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source document presents the resolution text once on page 1.
concerns.output_quote: The entire text of the resolution (e.g., 'RESOLUTION SUPPORTING THE RECLASSIFICATION...', 'WHEREAS, in September of 2021...', etc.) is rendered as HTML text at the top and then repeated as a series of white-on-black image blocks at the bottom of the page.
concerns.location: Bottom of the HTML screenshot, following the signature images.

action_items: Insert missing text 'Rep' in the first WHEREAS clause
Insert missing verb 'are' in the fourth WHEREAS clause
Correct 'Protective Service Occupations' to 'Protective Services Occupations'
Remove redundant image segments that duplicate the converted text
